name: mcp-doc-search
description: Semantic documentation search for any monorepo. VS Code extension + MCP server. Local embeddings, no API key required.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Semantic documentation search powered by local AI embeddings. No API key required.

[$(book) Getting Started](command:docSearch.openWalkthrough)
[$(gear) Open Settings](command:docSearch.openSettings)
[$(database) Index Status](command:docSearch.openIndexStatus)
[$(search) Search Docs](command:docSearch.search)
[$(json) Generate .mcp.json](command:docSearch.generateMcpJson)

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Doc Search
walkthroughs.description: Set up semantic documentation search in your workspace.

steps.title: Configure Settings
steps.description:
Choose your AI model and set which files to index.

[Open Settings](command:docSearch.openSettings)

steps.title: Build Search Index
steps.description:
Index your documentation so it becomes searchable by meaning.

[Build Index](command:docSearch.openIndexStatus)

steps.title: Search Your Docs
steps.description:
Find relevant documentation using natural language queries.

[Search Docs](command:docSearch.search)

steps.title: Use with an AI Assistant
steps.description:
Generate an MCP config so any MCP-compatible AI assistant can search your docs.

[Generate .mcp.json](command:docSearch.generateMcpJson)

docSearch.docGlob.description: Glob pattern for documentation files to index

docSearch.indexDir.description: Directory to store the vector index (relative to workspace root). Applies in workspace mode only. Setting this to a non-default value implies workspace mode.

enumDescriptions: Store the index under ~/.doc-search (no .gitignore changes needed; an existing .doc-search-index is auto-migrated on first use).
Legacy behaviour: store the index in-tree at the directory specified by indexDir (added to .gitignore automatically).
docSearch.indexLocation.markdownDescription:
Where to store the vector index.

- **global** — stored under `~/.doc-search` (or `$DOC_SEARCH_HOME`). No `.gitignore` changes are needed, and an existing `.doc-search-index` in the workspace is automatically migrated on first use.
- **workspace** — legacy in-tree storage at the path set by `#docSearch.indexDir#`. The directory is added to `.gitignore` automatically.

docSearch.headingDepth.description: Split chunks on # only (1) or both # and ## (2)

docSearch.embedProvider.description: Embedding provider: local (bundled ONNX model), ollama, or openai

docSearch.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama server URL (used when embedProvider is 'ollama')

docSearch.ollamaModel.description: Ollama model name (used when embedProvider is 'ollama')

docSearch.openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key (used when embedProvider is 'openai')
docSearch.openaiApiKey.deprecationMessage: The OpenAI API key is stored in VS Code's SecretStorage. Set it via the Doc Search Settings panel. This setting is ignored and a value here will be migrated to SecretStorage on next activation.

docSearch.autoReindex.description: Automatically reindex changed markdown files on save

scripts.build: node esbuild.extension.mjs && node esbuild.mcp.mjs && node esbuild.cli.mjs
scripts.package: npm prune --omit=dev && vsce package; npm install
scripts.package:darwin-arm: npm prune --omit=dev && node scripts/prune-platform-deps.mjs darwin-arm64 && vsce package --target darwin-arm64; npm install
scripts.package:darwin-x64: npm prune --omit=dev && node scripts/prune-platform-deps.mjs darwin-x64 && vsce package --target darwin-x64; npm install
scripts.package:linux-x64: npm prune --omit=dev && node scripts/prune-platform-deps.mjs linux-x64 && vsce package --target linux-x64; npm install
scripts.package:win-x64: npm prune --omit=dev && node scripts/prune-platform-deps.mjs win32-x64 && vsce package --target win32-x64; npm install
